style_effects: Dust clouds swirl in chaotic spirals around Venusaur's fists and feet, each particle catching the warm amber light of a setting sun. A jagged, cracked-earth aura pulses faintly in deep burnt orange, radiating from contact points with the ground, while the surrounding air shimmers with subtle tremors visible as heat haze. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
